title: boerhavia hualienensis
intro: Boerhavia hualienensis, also known as Hualien boerhavia or Taiwanese boerhavia, is a species of flowering plant in the Four O'Clock family (Nyctaginaceae). It is an herbaceous perennial native to Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating edema, and treating kidney stones and other urinary disorders. Boerhavia hualienensis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
